nasb.text: From beyond the rivers of Ethiopia My worshipers, My dispersed ones, Will bring My offerings.

esv.text: From beyond the rivers of Cush my worshipers, the daughter of my dispersed ones, shall bring my offering.

cnv.text: 敬拜我的人，就是我所分散的人， 必從古實河外而來， 給我獻上禮物。

ccb.text: 那些敬拜我的， 就是我那些分散的子民必从古实河对岸带着供物来献给我。
